sentences.arabic: الْقُرْآنُ الْكَرِيمُ أَثَّرَ كَثِيرًا فِي اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Časni Kur'an je mnogo utjecao na arapski jezik.
sentences.translationEn: The Holy Quran has greatly influenced the Arabic language.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الْكُتَّابُ مِنْهُ الْبَلَاغَةَ وَقُوَّةَ التَّعْبِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Pisci su iz njega naučili rječitost i snagu izražavanja.
sentences.translationEn: Writers learned eloquence and power of expression from it.

sentences.arabic: نَجِدُ فِي الْأَدَبِ كَلِمَاتٍ رَائِعَةً مُسْتَوْحَاةً مِنَ النَّصِّ الشَّرِيفِ.
sentences.translation: U književnosti nalazimo divne riječi inspirisane časnim tekstom.
sentences.translationEn: In literature, we find wonderful words inspired by the noble text.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ اللُّغَةُ تَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الْبَسَاطَةِ وَالْعُمْقِ فِي نَفْسِ الْوَقْتِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj jezik spaja jednostavnost i dubinu u isto vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: This language combines simplicity and depth at the same time.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ هَذِهِ الْأَعْمَالَ لِفَهْمِ الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ الْأَصِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi čitaju ova djela kako bi razumjeli izvornu arapsku kulturu.
sentences.translationEn: People read these works to understand the authentic Arabic culture.
